entry.title: New IDC NNG10AZ10B awarded to BALL AEROSPACE & TECHNOLOGIES CORP. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: All requirements will be issued under individual delivery orders

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: RAPID III SPACECRAFT ACQUISITION PLACE OF PERF: BOULDER, CO RAPID III PROVIDES CORE SPACECRAFT SYSTEMS IN SUPPORT OF THE SCIENTIFIC AND TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT GOALS OF THE NATIONAL AERONAUTICS AND SPACE ADMINISTRATION, GODDARD SPACE FLIGHT CENTER, AND OTHER FEDERAL AGENCIES. THE SCOPE OF WORK INCLUDES DESIGN, BUILD AND TEST, PAYLOAD INTEGRATION AND TEST, LAUNCH VEHICLE INTEGRATION AND SUPPORT AND ON-ORBIT CHECKOUT AND ACCEPTANCE.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: GUIDED MISSILE AND SPACE VEHICLE MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE
